## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Related issue

Fixes #
<!-- Or: Refs #123, Closes #456. If there's no issue, briefly explain the motivation above. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing public API)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Sample / example change
- [ ] Internal refactor (no user-visible change)

## Testing

How did you verify this works?

- [ ] Compiled in Unity 2020.3.49f1 (or later — list version: `____`)
- [ ] Tested against a real Cephable device, not just in isolation
- [ ] Sample scene still works
- [ ] New tests added (if applicable)

Describe your test setup (device, OS, target platform, scenario):

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing C# style in the repo
- [ ] I've updated the README if I changed public API or added a feature
- [ ] I haven't introduced new third-party dependencies (or I've explained why one is necessary)
- [ ] No Client Secrets, OAuth tokens, or personal credentials are committed
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and reference related issues

## Screenshots / clips

If this is a UX or visible behavior change, add a screenshot or short clip.

## Notes for reviewers

Anything tricky, intentional trade-offs, follow-up work, or areas where you'd like extra eyes.
